description.zh-CN:
你的 AI 团队，在你的设备上，由你掌控。
选择你偏好的语言和主题，开始探索。
description.en-US:
Your AI team. On your devices. Under your control.
Select your preferred language and theme to get started.

description.zh-CN:
编程、写作、数据分析、项目管理……选对专家，事半功倍。
不确定找谁？问 Yao Agents，它帮你调度。
description.en-US:
Coding, writing, data analysis, project management — pick the right expert, get better results.
Not sure who to ask? Yao Agents routes you to the right one.

title.en-US: Set the Goal, Let It Run

description.zh-CN: 创建 Robot，设置触发条件。晨间简报、邮件处理、数据报告——你睡觉，它干活。
description.en-US: Create a Robot, set the trigger. Morning briefings, inbox processing, data reports — done while you sleep.

description.zh-CN:
完成几项基础配置，释放全部能力。
也可以直接开聊，边用边配。
description.en-US:
Complete a few quick settings to unlock full power.
Or just start chatting — set up as you go.
